auto-mute-music.name: Auto Mute Music
auto-mute-music.description: Automaticly mutes the music upon entering a level.

auto-mute-sfx.name: Auto Mute Sfx
auto-mute-sfx.description: Automaticly mutes the sfx upon entering a level.

use-diff-textures.name: Use Alternate Textures
use-diff-textures.description: Swaps the music texture with a sound texture
